title: Scripture File Frontmatter
description: Required YAML frontmatter for all canon/ Scripture files

book_code.description: Ratified SBL-style book code from anchor_registry.json

book_name.description: Full English name as it appears in the OSB

canon_position.description: Integer position in the 76-book canon, or 'appendix' for PMN/4MA

lxx_name.description: LXX/Septuagint name if different from OSB English name (optional)

osb_name.description: OSB-specific name if different from standard (e.g. '2 Ezra' for Ezra) (optional)

parse_date.description: ISO 8601 date when the file was parsed from source

promote_date.description: ISO 8601 date when the file was promoted to canon (set by promote.py)

checksum.description: SHA-256 of verse text body only (excludes frontmatter). Set by promote.py.

status.description: Pipeline stage. Only 'promoted' files live in canon/

deuterocanonical.description: True if the book or book additions are deuterocanonical

has_additions.description: True if the book contains LXX additions not in the MT (e.g. Esther, Daniel)
